summary: Session 6 shipped both significance-flagging surfaces end-to-end. New files: ai_router/decision_review_queue.py (~168 LOC: read_queue / clear_queue / queue_path with malformed-line and non-object-line skip-with-WARN, idempotent clear, FileNotFoundError-tolerant); tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/configEditor/annotationParser.ts (~165 LOC: findAnnotations regex parser supporting # and // comment styles, escaped quotes/backslashes, newline-rejection inside reason; deduplicateAnnotations file+line+reason dedup; binary-search line-number lookup; host-independent POSIX path normalization via replace); tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/commands/{decisionReviewQueue,flagDecisionForReview,annotationScanner,scanAnnotationsForActiveSet}.ts (~390 LOC: pure helpers split from vscode wiring so the testable surface — appendQueueEntry, findActiveSessionSetDir, scanFilesForAnnotations, loadHonorAnnotationsToggle, loadExistingQueueEntries, toPosixPath — runs without @vscode/test-electron). Updated: tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/package.json (two new command registrations), src/extension.ts (safeRegister wiring), src/configEditor/ConfigEditorPanel.ts (_runFlagDecisionCommand now unconditional executeCommand), src/configEditor/sections/significanceFlaggingSection.ts (docblock + rendered HTML corrected to describe the actual workspace-walk command rather than the stale Session-5 'orchestrator scans open files at session start' copy), docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (new 'Significance flagging' Key Concept section documenting both surfaces, queue path, JSON shape, honor-annotations toggle, session-start read+clear flow), ai_router/__init__.py (re-exports the queue surface), ai_router/CHANGELOG.md + tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/CHANGELOG.md (Session-6 'Added' blocks). Test counts: 107 -> 120 pure-unit TS; 414 -> 427 Python. tsc clean. Cross-provider verification: 2 slices via gpt-5-4 ($0.254 A + $0.172 B = $0.426 total). Slice A returned 3 Major findings — regex newline crossing, host-dependent path normalization, stale section HTML copy — all addressed in code with new tests. Slice B returned 1 Major + 1 Minor — belt-and-suspenders POSIX normalization at the scanner boundary + a host-conditional test that wouldn't surface the bug off-Windows — both addressed via a new toPosixPath helper applied at both call sites + a literal-Windows-input host-independent test. Cumulative Set 026 verification spend: $3.07 + $0.43 = $3.50 of $10.00 NTE.

reason.specifics: Session 7 is wizard integration + test-notification button + adoption-doc / quick-start updates + CHANGELOG finalization + end-to-end smoke test + Marketplace + PyPI release (v0.13.15 + ai_router 0.3.0). Coordination-heavy rather than new-surface-heavy: pulling together prior sessions' deliverables. Spec routing notes call for Opus at effort=medium.
